violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Microwave have build up and needs cleaning. -Cart for chip storage needs cleaning
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Build up on system and needs cleaning.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Plates, platters, and baskets stored up-right throughout kitchen area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Walls on North side of cooking line need cleaning -Walk in freezer has product on the floor in need of cleaning -Walk in cooler dirty and needs cleaning -Floors under equipment need cleaning -Monitors over food prep need cleaning

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items -Light fixture is cracked and in need of repair over southern food prep area in kitchen.
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
